admin-services.title: Data Pipelines & Integration
admin-services.summary: End-to-end ETL/ELT pipelines, data integration from APIs/databases/files, transformation, and workflow automation.
admin-services.body: End-to-end ETL/ELT pipelines, data integration from APIs/databases/files, transformation, and workflow automation using Python, SQL, and orchestration tools.

admin-services.title: Database Architecture
admin-services.summary: Design scalable relational databases with star schemas, dimensional modeling, warehousing, efficient indexing.
admin-services.body: Design scalable relational databases with star schemas, dimensional modeling, warehousing, efficient indexing, and query optimization.

admin-services.title: Data Quality & Validation
admin-services.summary: Implement validation rules, schema checks, duplicate detection, missing value handling, and monitoring.
admin-services.body: Implement validation rules, schema checks, duplicate detection, missing value handling, and comprehensive data quality monitoring.

admin-services.title: Data Governance
admin-services.summary: Design data systems with documentation, audit trails, access control, metadata management, and best practices.
admin-services.body: Design data systems with documentation, audit trails, access control, metadata management, and governance best practices.

admin-services.title: Analytics Engineering
admin-services.summary: Prepare clean, well-structured datasets for dashboards, business intelligence, analytical reporting.
admin-services.body: Prepare clean, well-structured datasets for dashboards, business intelligence, analytical reporting, and data-driven insights.

admin-services.title: Pipeline Reliability & Monitoring
admin-services.summary: Build observable, reliable pipelines with logging, error handling, retry mechanisms, alerts, testing, and CI/CD.
admin-services.body: Build observable, reliable pipelines with logging, error handling, retry mechanisms, alerts, DataOps practices, testing, and CI/CD deployment.

admin-services.title: API Development
admin-services.summary: Build RESTful APIs with FastAPI for data ingestion, processing, integration, and secure data access layers.
admin-services.body: Build RESTful APIs with FastAPI for data ingestion, processing, integration, and secure data access layers.

admin-services.title: Web Scraping & Data Collection
admin-services.summary: Collect structured data from websites, public datasets, APIs, CSV, JSON, XML sources.
admin-services.body: Collect structured data from websites, public datasets, APIs, CSV, JSON, XML sources, and third-party services for downstream processing.

admin-services.title: Performance Optimization
admin-services.summary: Optimize SQL queries, pipeline execution, storage efficiency, data processing speed, and system scalability.
admin-services.body: Optimize SQL queries, pipeline execution, storage efficiency, data processing speed, and system scalability for production performance.

admin-services.title: Technical Documentation
admin-services.summary: Produce clear technical documentation, architecture diagrams, data dictionaries, and pipeline documentation.
admin-services.body: Produce clear technical documentation, architecture diagrams, data dictionaries, and pipeline documentation for maintainability and knowledge sharing.

admin-experience.desc:
Analyzed 100K+ automotive records to surface vehicle-segment trends and improve business insights.
Built Python/SQL ETL and automated reports (Power BI dashboards) to cut processing time and manual work by ~30–35%.

admin-experience.desc:
Cleaned and validated large-scale senior-housing datasets to boost reliability and analysis accuracy. 
Built Python/SQL preprocessing workflows and Git-based version control to cut manual effort and integration conflicts by ~20%, supporting faster, data-driven decisions.

admin-manifesto.title: Built in silence. Engineered with intent.
paragraphs: My path isn't defined by the noise of the industry, but by the structural integrity of the systems I build.
I specialize in architecting ethical data platforms that balance high-performance engineering with absolute governance.
My approach in data ops aims for ethical intelligent data systems.
